situation: audit-2026-07-06-022 finding M-013: feedback_collector.py:70 _append_reward() opens topic_reward.jsonl in append mode and writes json.dumps + newline without any cross-process locking. POSIX open(...,'a') atomicity only covers single write syscall < PIPE_BUF; Python buffered writer may split, and concurrent `ingest` invocations (e.g., parallel post-publish callbacks) can interleave partial JSON lines, corrupting the reward log consumed by hot-scanner UCB ranking.
action: Add import fcntl; wrap _append_reward write block with fcntl.flock(LOCK_EX)/LOCK_UN plus explicit flush inside try/finally. cp-guard blocked opt-worktree.sh commit (prior unmerged edits on same file in this worktree), so committed directly inside existing route-fix worktree opt-wechat-main-1783130541 and pushed.
